since_last: 52% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.03%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 52% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.54% · BTC -0.28% · Gold +1.36% · Nasdaq100 +1.83%. 52% of 87 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.03%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.03%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.73%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +18.48%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +18.48%, QCOM +9.07%, TER +7.95%, AMAT +6.90%, INTC +6.46%. Laggards: DELL -8.22%, APP -7.95%, NOW -4.46%, AI -4.29%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.21% at $157.95
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.21% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
